_comment: TEMPLATE — copy to monitor-manifest.json, fill `monitors`. The durable record of the watcher set this role EXPECTS running; reconcile it against the live /tasks list at session-start / post-compact / post-resume (clacks/monitor-hygiene.md). Orchestrator: this lives at working/program/. Shepherd: same shape at working/lanes/<lane>/_state/monitor-manifest.json.

monitors.target: «what it watches — e.g. lane outbox.jsonl, or the workstream's Cosmo Stage»
monitors.purpose: «why — e.g. catch rulings; catch review verdicts»
monitors.task-id: «live task/session id once armed — refresh on reconcile»
